text: 英語 聽力 模擬 視題
zh: 英语 听力 模拟 视题

text: 二十
zh: 二十

text: 第一節
zh: 第一节

text: 聽下面五段對話
zh: 听下面五段对话

text: 每段對話後有一個小題
zh: 每段对话后有一个小题

text: 從題中所給的
zh: 从题中所给的

text: A, B, C 三個選項中
zh: A, B, C 三个选项中

text: 選出最佳選項
zh: 选出最佳选项

text: 聽完每段對話後
zh: 听完每段对话后

text: 你都有十秒鐘的時間
zh: 你都有十秒钟的时间

text: 來回答有關小題
zh: 来回答有关小题

text: 和閱讀下一小題
zh: 和阅读下一小题

text: 每段對話
zh: 每段对话

text: 盡讀一遍
zh: 尽读一遍

text: 現在
zh: 现在

text: 你有五秒鐘的時間
zh: 你有五秒钟的时间

text: 閱讀第一小題的有關內容
zh: 阅读第一小题的有关内容

text: I heard you parked your car in the parking lot
zh: 我听说你把车停在我们公司附近的停车场了

text: near our company
zh: 月租多少钱？

text: How much is the monthly rent?
zh: 去年是每月231元

text: Last year, it was 231 per month
zh: 但今年涨到了231元

text: but it has gone up by 201 this year
zh: 呃，这周的天气太让人难受了

text: Ugh, this week's weather is killing me
zh: 早上都雾蒙蒙的

text: It's been foggy in the mornings
zh: 是啊，别提了

text: Tell me about it
zh: 天气预报员预测周末会是晴天

text: The weatherman predicts sunny days this weekend
zh: 但说下周一会有台风来袭。

text: But says a typhoon is approaching next Monday
zh: 但是说下周一将有台风接近

text: Helen, the printer is out of paper
zh: 海伦，打印机没纸了

text: I need to print some meeting materials
zh: 我需要打印一些会议资料

text: There's some paper in the storage room upstairs
zh: 楼上储藏室里有一些纸

text: I'll go and get a pack
zh: 我去拿一包

text: Thanks
zh: 谢谢

text: Lisa, this table looks old
zh: 丽莎，这张桌子看起来很旧

text: We should do something about it
zh: 我们应该做些改善

text: How about repainting it?
zh: 如何重新油漆它？

text: We can choose a bright color
zh: 我们可以选择一个明亮的颜色

text: Sounds nice
zh: 听起来不错。

text: But I'm worried the paint won't stick well
zh: 但我担心油漆粘不牢

text: We could sound the surface first
zh: 我们可以先打磨一下表面

text: That would solve the problem
zh: 那样就能解决问题了

text: I'm going to tidy up my room
zh: 我要整理一下我的房间

text: It's a mess
zh: 乱七八糟的

text: Could you give me a hand?
zh: 你可以帮我一下吗？

text: I'm afraid I can't
zh: 恐怕我帮不上忙

text: I'll help mom bake some cookies in the kitchen
zh: 我会帮妈妈在厨房烤一些饼干

text: After that, I'll go to Dylan's place to finish a school project with him
zh: 之后，我会去迪伦那里和他一起完成一个学校项目

text: Professor Lowne's classes are interesting
zh: 劳恩教授的课很有趣

text: But all those historical events, schools and theories are driving me crazy
zh: 但所有这些历史事件、学派和理论都让我疯狂

text: I feel you
zh: 我理解你的感受

text: Take the Industrial Revolution, for example
zh: 以工业革命为例

text: There's an endless list of terms and concepts to remember
zh: 要记住的专业术语和概念实在太多了

text: Yes, and it's not easy to remember the contributions of the figures like Shakespeare
zh: 是的，要记住莎士比亚这样的人物的贡献并不容易

text: Maybe we can watch some historical documentaries or movies
zh: 或许我们可以看一些历史纪录片或电影

text: Sounds great
zh: 听起来不错

text: Reading historical novels might also help
zh: 阅读历史小说可能也会有帮助

text: Professor Lowne's classes are interesting
zh: 洛尼教授的课很有趣

text: But all those historical events, schools and theories are driving me crazy
zh: 但所有这些历史事件、学派和理论都让我疯狂

text: I feel you
zh: 我理解你

text: Take the Industrial Revolution, for example
zh: 拿工业革命来说

text: There's an endless list of terms and concepts to remember
zh: 有很多术语和概念需要记住

text: Yes, and it's not easy to remember the contributions of the figures like Shakespeare
zh: 是的，记住像莎士比亚这样人物的贡献并不容易

text: Maybe we can watch some historical documentaries or movies
zh: 也许我们可以看一些历史纪录片或电影

text: Sounds great
zh: 听起来不错

text: Reading historical novels might also help
zh: 阅读历史小说也可能有帮助

text: It'll be the Lantern Festival tomorrow, so I'll drop by the supermarket near our company to buy Yuan Xiaoh
zh: 明天是元宵节，所以我会去我们公司附近的超市买元宵

text: I remember you bought a bag of that last weekend
zh: 我记得你上个周末买了一袋

text: Yes, but that bag of Yuan Xiaoh has already been eaten up by my daughter
zh: 是的，但那袋元宵已经被我女儿吃光了

text: She has eaten Yuan Xiaoh every morning in the past few days
zh: 她最近几天每天早上都吃元宵

text: She has a sweet tooth and loves Yuan Xiaoh filled with strawberry jam
zh: 她有甜食的习惯，喜欢装有草莓酱的元宵

text: This time, I'll get some with peanut butter for my husband and blueberry jam for myself
zh: 这次我会给丈夫买些花生酱的，给自己买些蓝莓果酱的

text: You know, I've been in China for half a year or so
zh: 你知道吗，我在中国呆了大约半年

text: But I've never had Yuan Xiaoh, is it really that good?
zh: 但我从来没有吃过元宵，真的那么好吃吗？

text: I heard it can be boiled, fried or steamed
zh: 我听说可以煮、炸或蒸元宵

text: Each way gives it a different flavor
zh: 每种方式都会赋予它不同的风味

text: Yup, but we eat Yuan Xiaoh not just because it's delicious
zh: 是的，但我们吃元宵不仅仅因为它好吃

text: The round shape of Yuan Xiaoh symbolizes family togetherness
zh: 元宵的圆形象征着家庭团聚

text: We believe that eating Yuan Xiaoh may bring the family harmony, happiness and luck in the new year
zh: 我们相信吃元宵可能会在新的一年给家庭带来和谐、幸福和好运

text: Lily, do you have any plans after work today?
zh: 莉莉，今天下班后有什么计划吗？

text: Well, it'll be the Lantern Festival tomorrow, so I'll drop by the supermarket near our company to buy Yuan Xiaoh
zh: 嗯，明天是元宵节，所以我会顺便去我们公司附近的超市买元宵。

text: I remember you bought a bag of that last weekend
zh: 我记得你上个周末买了一袋。

text: Yes, but that bag of Yuan Xiaoh has already been eaten up by my daughter
zh: 是的，但那袋元宵已经被我女儿吃光了。

text: She has eaten Yuan Xiaoh every morning in the past few days
zh: 她过去几天每天早上都吃元宵。

text: She has a sweet tooth and loves Yuan Xiaoh filled with strawberry jam
zh: 她喜欢吃草莓果酱馅的元宵，她有很甜的口味。

text: This time, I'll get some with peanut butter for my husband and blueberry jam for myself
zh: 这一次，我会买点花生酱的给我丈夫，蓝莓果酱的给我自己。

text: You know, I've been in China for half a year or so
zh: 你知道吗，我在中国已经半年多了。

text: But I've never had Yuan Xiaoh, is it really that good?
zh: 但我从来没吃过元宵，真的那么好吃吗？

text: I heard it can be boiled, fried or steamed
zh: 我听说它可以煮、煎或蒸。

text: Each way gives it a different flavor
zh: 每种方式都赋予了它不同的风味

text: Yup, but we eat Yuan Xiaoh not just because it's delicious
zh: 是的，但我们吃元宵不仅仅因为它好吃

text: The round shape of Yuan Xiaoh symbolizes family togetherness
zh: 元宵的圆形象征着家庭团聚

text: We believe that eating Yuan Xiaoh may bring the family harmony, happiness and luck in the new year
zh: 我们相信吃元宵可能会给家庭带来和谐、快乐和幸运的新一年

text: Excuse me, how much are these t-shirts?
zh: 请问，这些T恤多少钱一件？

text: $20 each
zh: 每件20美元

text: I would like to buy some for my niece, my twin nephews and my son
zh: 我想为我侄女、我双胞胎侄子和我儿子买一些

text: What size do you want?
zh: 你想要什么尺码？

text: A medium size for my niece and three small ones for the boys
zh: 我侄女要中号，三份小号给男孩子们

text: Okay, what designs do you want?
zh: 好的，你想要什么款式？

text: Well, my son would definitely want this blue quality shirt
zh: 嗯，我儿子肯定会喜欢这件蓝色的高质量衬衫

text: And my niece likes red and is crazy about kangaroos
zh: 我侄女喜欢红色，狂热地迷恋袋鼠

text: And I will choose these white dinosaur t-shirts for the twins
zh: 我会为双胞胎选择这些白色的恐龙T恤

text: Good choices
zh: 不错的选择

text: Do you have a membership card of our store?
zh: 你有我们店的会员卡吗？

text: You can have these at 10% off the regular price if you have it
zh: 如果有的话，你可以以正价的九折购买这些

text: Oh, I'm just a tourist here
zh: 哦，我只是一个游客

text: I came to Australia mainly for a business conference
zh: 我主要是来澳大利亚参加商务会议的

text: Excuse me, how much are these t-shirts?
zh: 打扰一下，请问这些T恤多少钱？

text: $20 each
zh: 每件20美元

text: I would like to buy some for my niece, my twin nephews and my son
zh: 我想给侄女、孪生侄子和儿子买一些

text: What size do you want?
zh: 你想要什么尺码？

text: A medium size for my niece and three small ones for the boys
zh: 侄女要中号，孩子们要三个小号

text: Okay, what designs do you want?
zh: 好的，你想要哪些款式？

text: Well, my son would definitely want this blue quality shirt
zh: 我儿子肯定想要这件蓝色的高品质衬衫

text: And my niece likes red and is crazy about kangaroos
zh: 我侄女喜欢红色，疯狂地喜欢袋鼠

text: And I will choose these white dinosaur t-shirts for the twins
zh: 我会为孪生侄子选择这些白色的恐龙T恤

text: Good choices
zh: 不错的选择

text: Do you have a membership card of our store?
zh: 你有我们店的会员卡吗？

text: You can have these at 10% off the regular price if you have it
zh: 如果你有会员卡，可以享受正常价格的九折优惠。

text: Oh, I'm just a tourist here
zh: 哦，我只是个游客

text: I came to Australia mainly for a business conference
zh: 我主要是来澳大利亚参加一个商务会议的

text: I heard you're considering moving out of your parents place
zh: 我听说你在考虑搬出你父母家

text: Yes, my parents and I have a great relationship
zh: 是的，我和父母关系很好

text: They've been incredibly supportive
zh: 他们给予了我极大的支持

text: However, I feel like it's time to stand on my own two feet
zh: 但是，我觉得是时候独立自主了

text: I want to be responsible for all aspects of my life
zh: 我想要对我的生活的方方面面负责

text: From paying the bills to making my own decisions about daily routines
zh: 从支付账单到自己决定日常安排

text: That's a really mature way of thinking
zh: 你的想法真的很成熟

text: So, what kind of place are you looking for?
zh: 那你在找什么样的房子？

text: You know, I'm now illustrating a children's book
zh: 你知道，我现在正在插画一本儿童书籍

text: So a place with plenty of natural light would be good
zh: 所以一个有充足自然光的地方会很好

text: I can enjoy the sunlight while I bury myself in my creative world
zh: 我可以在创作世界中埋头苦干时享受阳光

text: That makes sense. Anything else?
zh: 那有道理。还有其他要求吗？

text: I've been trying to get into the habit of cooking more healthy meals for myself
zh: 我一直在努力养成为自己做更健康饮食的习惯

text: So a place with a big kitchen would be a must
zh: 所以一个有大厨房的地方是必须的

text: I see. I can help you look through a list of houses to rent online
zh: 我明白了。我可以帮你在网上找租房清单

text: That would be great. Thanks a lot
zh: 那太好了。非常感谢

text: I heard you're considering moving out of your parents place
zh: 我听说你正在考虑搬出父母家

text: Yes, my parents and I have a great relationship
zh: 是的，我和父母关系很好

text: They've been incredibly supportive
zh: 他们一直非常支持我

text: However, I feel like it's time to stand on my own two feet
zh: 不过，我觉得现在是时候独立自主了

text: I want to be responsible for all aspects of my life
zh: 我想要对我生活的方方面面负责

text: From paying the bills to making my own decisions about daily routines
zh: 从支付账单到决定我的日常生活安排

text: That's a really mature way of thinking
zh: 这是一种非常成熟的思维方式

text: So, what kind of place are you looking for?
zh: 那么，你正在寻找什么样的地方呢？

text: You know, I'm now illustrating a children's book
zh: 你知道，我现在正在为一本儿童书籍绘图

text: So a place with plenty of natural light would be good
zh: 所以一个有很多自然光线的地方会很不错

text: I can enjoy the sunlight while I bury myself in my creative world
zh: 我可以在沉浸在我的创造世界中时享受阳光

text: That makes sense. Anything else?
zh: 那很有道理。还有其他要求吗？

text: I've been trying to get into the habit of cooking more healthy meals for myself
zh: 我一直在努力养成为自己做更健康餐的习惯

text: So a place with a big kitchen would be a must
zh: 所以一个有大厨房的地方是必不可少的

text: I see. I can help you look through a list of houses to rent online
zh: 我知道了。我可以帮你在线查看租房清单

text: That would be great. Thanks a lot
zh: 那太好了。非常感谢

text: Are you a fan of reading but trying to save some money?
zh: 你喜欢阅读但又想省点钱吗？

text: The internet has tons of free books available
zh: 互联网上有大量免费书籍可以找到

text: And I'll introduce three good sites to find them
zh: 我会介绍三个好网站给你找

text: Let's start our journey with Project Gutenberg
zh: 让我们从古腾堡计划开始我们的旅程

text: One of the oldest and most respected free book websites out there
zh: 这是最古老和备受尊重的免费书籍网站之一

text: Founded in 1971, this website offers over 60,000 free ebooks
zh: 成立于1971年，这个网站提供超过6万本免费电子书籍

text: And is a gold mine for classic literature
zh: 对于经典文学爱好者来说，这是一个金矿

text: Next up is internet archive Founded in 1996
zh: 接下来是互联网档案馆，成立于1996年

text: For book lovers, it's a treasure chest waiting to be opened
zh: 对于书籍爱好者，这是一个等待被打开的宝藏箱

text: It has rare and out-of-print books you might not find elsewhere
zh: 它拥有你在别处找不到的稀有和绝版书籍

text: It even has old magazines and comics
zh: 它甚至拥有旧杂志和漫画

text: If you're a student or someone looking to learn new skills
zh: 如果你是一名学生或想要学习新技能的人

text: Book Boone, founded in 1988, is a website you'll want to try
zh: 成立于1988年的Book Boone是一个你会想要尝试的网站

text: This site focuses on providing free textbooks and educational materials
zh: 这个网站专注于提供免费教科书和教育资料

text: Here are three final tips to help you get the best out of these free book sites
zh: 以下是三条帮助你充分利用这些免费书籍网站的最终提示

text: Try different sites, don't stick to just one website
zh: 尝试不同的网站，不要只固守一家网站

text: Mix them up to find a perfect book for you
zh: 把它们混合在一起，找到适合你的完美书籍

text: Support your favorite authors
zh: 支持你喜欢的作者

text: If you find a free book by a modern author that you really like
zh: 如果你发现一本现代作者写的免费书真的很喜欢

text: Think about buying their other books or writing a review to help them out
zh: 考虑购买他们的其他书籍或写一篇评论来帮助他们

text: Check back often
zh: 经常回来看看

text: Many of these websites update their selections regularly
zh: 许多网站会定期更新他们的选择

text: Make it a habit to visit them to see what's new
zh: 养成习惯经常拜访他们以查看新内容

text: Remember, you don't have to spend a lot to enjoy reading
zh: 记住，你不必花费很多钱就能享受阅读

text: Jump in, explore, and let your passion for reading grow without spending much
zh: 加入进来，探索，让你对阅读的激情在不花太多钱的情况下生长

text: Are you a fan of reading but trying to save some money
zh: 你是阅读的粉丝但想要省一些钱吗？

text: The internet has tons of free books available and I'll introduce three good sites to find them
zh: 互联网上有大量免费书籍可供阅读，我将介绍三个好的网站来寻找它们

text: Let's start our journey with Project Gutenberg
zh: 让我们从古登堡计划开始我们的旅程

text: One of the oldest and most respected free book websites out there
zh: 这是最古老和备受尊重的免费书籍网站之一

text: Founded in 1971
zh: 创建于1971年

text: This website offers over 60,000 free e-books and is a gold mine for classic literature
zh: 该网站提供超过6万本免费电子书，是古典文学的宝库

text: Next up is internet archive Founded in 1996
zh: 接下来是互联网档案馆，成立于1996年

text: For book lovers, it's a treasure chest waiting to be opened
zh: 对于书籍爱好者来说，这是一个等待被打开的宝藏

text: It has rare and out-of-print books you might not find elsewhere
zh: 它拥有一些你在其他地方找不到的罕见和绝版书籍

text: It even has old magazines and comics
zh: 它甚至还有古老的杂志和漫画

text: If you're a student or someone looking to learn new skills
zh: 如果你是学生或想学习新技能的人

text: Book Boone, founded in 1988, is a website you'll want to try
zh: 图书宝库成立于1988年，是一个你会想尝试的网站

text: This site focuses on providing free textbooks and educational materials
zh: 该网站专注于提供免费教材和教育资料

text: Here are three final tips to help you get the best out of these free book sites
zh: 以下是三个最后的建议，帮助你在这些免费书籍网站上获得最大的收获

text: Try different sites. Don't stick to just one website
zh: 尝试不同的网站。不要只局限在一个网站上

text: Mix them up to find a perfect book for you
zh: 混合它们，找到适合你的完美书籍

text: Support your favorite authors
zh: 支持你最喜欢的作者

text: If you find a free book by a modern author that you really like
zh: 如果你发现了一本现代作者的免费书籍，你真的很喜欢

text: Think about buying their other books or writing a review to help them out
zh: 考虑购买他们的其他书籍或写一篇评论来帮助他们

text: Check back often
zh: 经常回来查看

text: Many of these websites update their selections regularly
zh: 许多网站经常更新他们的书籍选择

text: Make it a habit to visit them to see what's new
zh: 养成定期拜访他们，看看有什么新东西

text: Remember, you don't have to spend a lot to enjoy reading
zh: 记住，享受阅读不一定要花很多钱

text: Jump in, explore, and let your passion for reading grow without spending much
zh: 加入进来，探索着让自己对阅读的热情不断增长，而又不需要花费太多。
